---
title: "Release Situation Deck"
output:
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    vertical_layout: scroll
    theme:
      version: 4
      bootswatch: flatly
params:
  forecast_label:
    label: "Release to forecast (e.g. 2026.Q1)"
    value: "2026.Q1"
    input: text
  top_n:
    label: "Top N components to show"
    value: 20
    input: numeric
    min: 5
    max: 50
  exclude_2024:
    label: "Exclude 2024 from training data?"
    value: FALSE
    input: checkbox
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
required_pkgs <- c(
  "flexdashboard","dplyr","tidyr","ggplot2","reshape2",
  "MASS","pscl","randomForest","DT","scales","knitr","htmltools","crosstalk",
  "DBI","yaml","lubridate","forcats","here"
)
for (pkg in required_pkgs) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly=TRUE))
    install.packages(pkg, dependencies=TRUE, quiet=TRUE)
  suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(pkg, character.only=TRUE))
}

select  <- dplyr::select
filter  <- dplyr::filter
mutate  <- dplyr::mutate
arrange <- dplyr::arrange

options(scipen=999)
set.seed(42)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())

RISK_COLORS <- c(
  "Very Low"  = "#4DAF4A",
  "Low"       = "#A8D96F",
  "Medium"    = "#FFC107",
  "High"      = "#FF7F00",
  "Very High" = "#D32F2F"
)

risk_label <- function(pct) {
  cut(pct, breaks=c(-Inf,20,40,60,80,Inf),
      labels=c("Very Low","Low","Medium","High","Very High"))
}
```

```{r load-data}
source("/config/release_analytics_db.R")
con <- get_db_connection(config_path = "/config/config.yml")

raw <- dbGetQuery(con, "
  SELECT
    fi.quarter,
    dc.component_name   AS component,
    dc.team_name        AS team,
    dr.is_major_release::INT AS is_major_release,
    dr.is_lts::INT           AS is_lts,
    dr.release_date,
    COALESCE(ROUND((CURRENT_DATE - dr.release_date) / 30.0)::INT, 3) AS months_in_field,
    fi.lpp_count        AS lpp,
    fi.lpd_count        AS lpd,
    fi.story_count      AS stories,
    fi.backend_changes,
    fi.frontend_changes,
    fi.total_churn,
    fi.java_insertions,
    fi.tsx_insertions,
    fi.breaking_changes,
    fi.is_forecast_row
  FROM fact_forecast_input fi
  JOIN dim_component dc ON dc.component_id = fi.component_id
  JOIN dim_release   dr ON dr.release_label = fi.quarter
  WHERE fi.quarter LIKE '%.Q%'
  ORDER BY dr.release_date, dc.component_name
")

dbDisconnect(con)

# Legacy baselines
legacy <- raw %>%
  filter(grepl("2024", quarter)) %>%
  group_by(component) %>%
  summarise(legacy_lpp_avg = mean(lpp, na.rm=TRUE),
            legacy_lpd_avg = mean(lpd, na.rm=TRUE), .groups="drop")

raw <- raw %>%
  left_join(legacy, by="component") %>%
  mutate(
    has_legacy_data = ifelse(is.na(legacy_lpp_avg), 0, 1),
    legacy_lpp_avg  = ifelse(is.na(legacy_lpp_avg),
                             median(legacy$legacy_lpp_avg, na.rm=TRUE), legacy_lpp_avg),
    legacy_lpd_avg  = ifelse(is.na(legacy_lpd_avg),
                             median(legacy$legacy_lpd_avg, na.rm=TRUE), legacy_lpd_avg),
    log_months      = log(pmax(months_in_field, 1))
  )

# Splits
forecast_q <- params$forecast_label

# All completed Q releases (not the forecast target)
completed <- raw %>%
  filter(quarter != forecast_q, !is_forecast_row) %>%
  arrange(release_date)

# Maturity filter — only train on quarters >= 9 months in field.
# Younger quarters have incomplete bug counts (customers haven't had time
# to report them) which inverts the churn→bug signal and ruins model fit.
# 9 months is conservative: even Q2/Q3 releases need ~6-9 months to stabilize.
MIN_MONTHS <- 9
mature <- completed %>% filter(months_in_field >= MIN_MONTHS)
mature_q <- sort(unique(mature$quarter))

# Use 2024 quarters only for legacy baseline, not model training
# (process change in 2024 makes those counts less comparable)
# Training window: mature quarters that are NOT 2024
if (params$exclude_2024) {
  train_pool <- mature_q[!grepl("2024", mature_q)]
} else {
  train_pool <- mature_q
}

train_q <- head(train_pool, -1)
valid_q <- tail(train_pool,  1)

message(sprintf("Mature quarters (>= %d months): %s", MIN_MONTHS,
                paste(mature_q, collapse=", ")))
message(sprintf("Training on: %s", paste(train_q, collapse=", ")))
message(sprintf("Validating on: %s", valid_q))

train_data    <- mature %>% filter(quarter %in% train_q)
valid_data    <- mature %>% filter(quarter == valid_q)
forecast_data <- raw    %>% filter(quarter == forecast_q) %>%
  mutate(log_months=log(3), is_major_release=1L, is_lts=1L)
```

```{r model-training}
# =============================================================================
# LPP: Historical risk ranking — NOT a forecast
# 62% of component×quarter rows have zero LPP bugs. With only 5 mature training
# quarters available, count models produce unreliable predictions for LPP.
# Instead we rank components by historical LPP exposure adjusted for current churn.
# This is directionally correct for test prioritization even without a forecast.
#
# LPD: Trained forecast — Random Forest R²=0.56 on validation quarter.
# Sufficient for directional risk guidance.
# =============================================================================

soft_cap <- function(p, mx, m=3) pmin(p, mx*m)

get_metrics <- function(act, pred) list(
  MAE  = round(mean(abs(act-pred)),3),
  RMSE = round(sqrt(mean((act-pred)^2)),3),
  R2   = round(1 - sum((act-pred)^2)/sum((act-mean(act))^2),3)
)

mk <- function(df) df %>%
  rename(LPP=lpp, LPD=lpd, Stories=stories,
         backend=backend_changes, frontend=frontend_changes)

td <- mk(train_data)
vd <- mk(valid_data)
fd <- mk(forecast_data)

# ── LPD forecast models ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
form_lpd <- LPD ~ legacy_lpd_avg + Stories + log1p(backend) + log1p(frontend) +
            is_major_release + is_lts + has_legacy_data + is_major_release:Stories

fit <- function(formula, data, family="nb") {
  tryCatch({
    if (family=="nb")
      glm.nb(update(formula,.~.+offset(log_months)), data=data)
    else
      glm(update(formula,.~.+offset(log_months)), data=data, family="quasipoisson")
  }, error=function(e) NULL)
}

fit_rf <- function(formula, data) {
  tryCatch(randomForest::randomForest(formula, data=data, ntree=500, importance=TRUE),
           error=function(e) NULL)
}

m_lpd_nb <- fit(form_lpd, td, "nb")
m_lpd_qp <- fit(form_lpd, td, "qp")
m_lpd_rf <- fit_rf(LPD ~ months_in_field + legacy_lpd_avg + Stories + backend + frontend +
                   is_major_release + is_lts + has_legacy_data, td)

max_lpd <- max(td$LPD, na.rm=TRUE)

eval_m <- function(m, nm, vd, col, mx, rf=FALSE) {
  if (is.null(m)) return(NULL)
  p <- if(rf) predict(m,newdata=vd) else soft_cap(predict(m,newdata=vd,type="response"),mx)
  mt <- get_metrics(vd[[col]], p)
  data.frame(Model=nm, MAE=mt$MAE, RMSE=mt$RMSE, R2=mt$R2, stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
}

lpd_comp <- bind_rows(
  eval_m(m_lpd_nb, "NegBin",       vd,"LPD",max_lpd),
  eval_m(m_lpd_qp, "Quasi-Poisson",vd,"LPD",max_lpd),
  eval_m(m_lpd_rf, "Random Forest",vd,"LPD",max_lpd,rf=TRUE)
) %>% filter(!is.na(R2))

best_lpd <- lpd_comp$Model[which.max(lpd_comp$R2)]
lpd_r2   <- max(lpd_comp$R2)

lpd_model <- switch(best_lpd,
  "NegBin"       = m_lpd_nb,
  "Quasi-Poisson"= m_lpd_qp,
  "Random Forest"= m_lpd_rf)

# LPD calibration
lpd_vp   <- if(best_lpd=="Random Forest") predict(lpd_model,newdata=vd) else
               soft_cap(predict(lpd_model,newdata=vd,type="response"),max_lpd)
lpd_bias <- (mean(vd$LPD) - mean(lpd_vp)) / mean(vd$LPD) * 100
lpd_cal  <- if(abs(lpd_bias) > 20) mean(vd$LPD) / mean(lpd_vp) else 1.0

lpd_preds <- (if(best_lpd=="Random Forest") predict(lpd_model,newdata=fd) else
               soft_cap(predict(lpd_model,newdata=fd,type="response"),max_lpd)) * lpd_cal

# ── LPP historical risk score ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Weighted combination of:
#   60% historical LPP average (legacy exposure)
#   40% current churn signal (backend-weighted)
# Normalized to 0-100 percentile rank across components.
lpp_hist_score <- fd %>%
  mutate(
    churn_signal  = log1p(backend) + 0.5 * log1p(frontend),
    z_legacy      = (legacy_lpp_avg - mean(legacy_lpp_avg, na.rm=TRUE)) /
                     max(sd(legacy_lpp_avg, na.rm=TRUE), 1e-6),
    z_churn       = (churn_signal - mean(churn_signal, na.rm=TRUE)) /
                     max(sd(churn_signal, na.rm=TRUE), 1e-6),
    raw_lpp_score = 0.6 * z_legacy + 0.4 * z_churn
  ) %>%
  pull(raw_lpp_score)

# ── Combined risk scoring ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
results <- fd %>%
  mutate(
    # LPP: historical risk score (not a forecast)
    lpp_hist_score = lpp_hist_score,
    lpp_pct        = percent_rank(lpp_hist_score) * 100,
    lpp_risk       = risk_label(lpp_pct),

    # LPD: model forecast
    lpd_pred       = lpd_preds,
    lpd_pct        = percent_rank(lpd_preds) * 100,
    lpd_risk       = risk_label(lpd_pct),

    # Combined risk: equal weight LPP historical + LPD forecast
    risk_score     = lpp_pct + lpd_pct,
    overall_risk   = risk_label(percent_rank(risk_score) * 100),
    est_bugs       = lpd_pred   # est_bugs = LPD forecast only
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(risk_score)) %>%
  distinct(component, .keep_all=TRUE)
```

Overview
=====================================

Row {data-height=120}
-------------------------------------

### Forecast Target
```{r}
valueBox(params$forecast_label, icon="fa-bullseye", color="#2196F3")
```

### Training Quarters
```{r}
valueBox(length(train_q), icon="fa-database", color="#607D8B")
```

### LPP Risk Method
```{r}
valueBox("Historical Ranking", icon="fa-user",
         color="#607D8B",
         caption="60% legacy LPP + 40% churn signal")
```

### LPD Forecast Model
```{r}
valueBox(sprintf("%s  R²=%.2f", best_lpd, lpd_r2), icon="fa-bug",
         color=ifelse(lpd_r2>=0.6,"#4CAF50","#FF9800"))
```

### High Risk Components
```{r}
n_hi <- sum(results$overall_risk %in% c("High","Very High"))
valueBox(n_hi, icon="fa-exclamation-triangle",
         color=ifelse(n_hi>10,"#D32F2F",ifelse(n_hi>5,"#FF9800","#4CAF50")))
```

Row {data-height=420}
-------------------------------------

### Top Components by Risk Score {data-width=620}
```{r fig.height=6}
p_data <- results %>% 
  filter(!is.na(risk_score)) %>%
  head(params$top_n) %>%
  mutate(component=fct_reorder(component, risk_score))

ggplot(p_data, aes(x=component, y=risk_score, fill=overall_risk)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values=RISK_COLORS, name="Risk Level") +
  labs(title=sprintf("%s — Top %d Components", params$forecast_label, params$top_n),
       subtitle=sprintf("LPP: Historical risk ranking | LPD forecast: %s (R²=%.2f)", best_lpd, lpd_r2),
       x=NULL, y="Risk Score") +
  theme_minimal(base_size=11) +
  theme(legend.position="bottom", panel.grid.major.y=element_blank())
```

### LPP Risk vs LPD Forecast {data-width=380}
```{r fig.height=6}
ggplot(results, aes(x=lpp_pct, y=lpd_pred)) +
  geom_point(aes(color=overall_risk, size=est_bugs), alpha=0.7) +
  geom_text(data=results %>% head(8), aes(label=component),
            hjust=-0.1, size=2.8, check_overlap=TRUE) +
  scale_color_manual(values=RISK_COLORS, name="Risk") +
  scale_size_continuous(name="Est. LPD Bugs", range=c(2,8)) +
  labs(title="LPP Historical Risk vs LPD Forecast",
       subtitle="X = LPP historical risk percentile | Y = predicted internal defects",
       x="LPP Risk Percentile (historical)", y="Predicted LPD Bugs (forecast)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size=11) +
  theme(legend.position="bottom")
```

Row {data-height=300}
-------------------------------------

### LPD Model Performance
```{r}
lpd_comp %>%
  select(Model, R2, MAE, RMSE) %>%
  arrange(desc(R2)) %>%
  datatable(options=list(pageLength=5, dom='t'), rownames=FALSE,
            caption=sprintf("LPD validated on %s | calibration factor: %.3f", valid_q, lpd_cal)) %>%
  formatRound(c("R2","MAE","RMSE"),3) %>%
  formatStyle("R2", backgroundColor=styleInterval(c(0.4,0.6,0.75),
    c("#ffcccc","#fff3cd","#d4edda","#c3e6cb")))
```

### LPP Note {data-width=300}
```{r}
htmltools::div(
  style="padding:20px; background:#fff8e1; border-left:4px solid #FFC107; border-radius:4px;",
  htmltools::tags$h5("⚠️ LPP Forecasting Not Available"),
  htmltools::tags$p("Customer bug (LPP) forecasting requires more training data."),
  htmltools::tags$p(sprintf(
    "%d%% of component x quarter rows have zero LPP bugs. With only %d mature training quarters, count models are unreliable for LPP.",
    62L, length(train_q)
  )),
  htmltools::tags$p("LPP risk is shown as a historical ranking: components with high past LPP exposure and high current churn are flagged as highest risk."),
  htmltools::tags$p(htmltools::tags$strong("Improves with: "), "more historical data (re-extract Jira from 2023+) and additional mature quarters.")
)
```

Risk Heat Map
=====================================

Row {data-height=60}
-------------------------------------

### 
```{r}
htmltools::div(
  style="padding:8px 16px; background:#e3f2fd; border-left:4px solid #2196F3; border-radius:4px; font-size:13px;",
  htmltools::tags$strong("Showing: "), params$forecast_label,
  " | To view a different release (e.g. U147), re-knit with ",
  htmltools::tags$code('params = list(forecast_label = "U147")'),
  " from the R console."
)
```

Row {data-height=720}
-------------------------------------

### Risk DNA — Top `r params$top_n` Components {data-width=700}
```{r fig.height=9, fig.width=10}
hm <- results %>% head(params$top_n) %>% distinct(component, .keep_all=TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    log_backend  = log1p(backend),
    log_frontend = log1p(frontend),
    log_churn    = log1p(total_churn),
    log_java     = log1p(java_insertions),
    log_tsx      = log1p(tsx_insertions)
  ) %>%
  select(component, team,
         `Hist. Customer` = legacy_lpp_avg,
         `Hist. Internal` = legacy_lpd_avg,
         `Backend Churn`  = log_backend,
         `Frontend Churn` = log_frontend,
         `Total Churn`    = log_churn,
         `Java Ins`       = log_java,
         `TSX Ins`        = log_tsx)

cn <- names(hm)[-(1:2)]
hm_s <- hm
hm_s[cn] <- lapply(hm[cn], function(x) {
  r <- max(x,na.rm=TRUE)-min(x,na.rm=TRUE)
  if(r==0) rep(0,length(x)) else (x-min(x,na.rm=TRUE))/r
})

hm_s %>%
  mutate(component=factor(component, levels=rev(results$component[1:params$top_n]))) %>%
  pivot_longer(all_of(cn), names_to="indicator", values_to="value") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=indicator, y=component, fill=value)) +
  geom_tile(color="white", linewidth=0.4) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(colors=c("#f7fbff","#9ecae1","#2171b5","#08306b"),
                       name="Rel. Risk", limits=c(0,1)) +
  labs(title=sprintf("%s Risk Exposure — Top %d Components", params$forecast_label, params$top_n),
       subtitle="Normalized 0–1 per indicator | Sorted by overall risk score",
       x=NULL, y=NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=11) +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=35,hjust=1),
        panel.grid.major=element_blank())
```

### Top Components {data-width=300}
```{r}
library(crosstalk)

top_comp_data <- results %>%
  head(params$top_n) %>%
  select(Component=component, Team=team,
         `LPP Risk Pct`=lpp_pct, `LPD Pred`=lpd_pred,
         `Score`=risk_score, `Risk`=overall_risk) %>%
  mutate(across(c(`LPP Risk Pct`,`LPD Pred`,Score), ~round(.,1)))

shared_top <- SharedData$new(top_comp_data, ~Team)

bscols(
  widths = c(12),
  filter_select("team_filter", "Filter by Team", shared_top, ~Team)
)

datatable(shared_top,
          options = list(
            pageLength = params$top_n,
            dom = "t",
            scrollY = "500px",
            scrollCollapse = TRUE
          ),
          rownames = FALSE) %>%
  formatStyle("Risk",
    backgroundColor = styleEqual(names(RISK_COLORS), unname(RISK_COLORS)),
    color = styleEqual(names(RISK_COLORS), c("black","black","black","black","white"))) %>%
  formatStyle("Score",
    background = styleColorBar(c(0, 200), "#2196F3"),
    backgroundSize = "100% 90%",
    backgroundRepeat = "no-repeat",
    backgroundPosition = "center")
```

Team Drilldown
=====================================

Row {data-height=400}
-------------------------------------

### Team Risk Summary
```{r fig.height=5}
team_sum <- results %>%
  filter(!is.na(team)) %>%
  group_by(team) %>%
  summarise(n=n(), lpp=round(mean(lpp_pct),1), lpd=round(sum(lpd_pred),0),
            avg_risk=round(mean(risk_score),1),
            n_high=sum(overall_risk %in% c("High","Very High")), .groups="drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_risk))

ggplot(team_sum, aes(x=reorder(team, avg_risk), y=avg_risk, fill=avg_risk)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(aes(label=sprintf("%.0f", avg_risk)), hjust=-0.1, size=3.5) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low="#4DAF4A", mid="#FFC107", high="#D32F2F",
                       midpoint=100, guide="none") +
  labs(title=sprintf("%s — Avg Risk Score by Team", params$forecast_label),
       x=NULL, y="Avg Risk Score") +
  theme_minimal(base_size=11) +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y=element_blank())
```

### Team Table
```{r}
team_sum %>% arrange(desc(avg_risk)) %>%
  select(Team=team, Components=n, `Avg LPP Risk%`=lpp, `Pred LPD`=lpd,
         `Avg Risk`=avg_risk, `High Risk`=n_high) %>%
  datatable(options=list(pageLength=15,dom='tp'), rownames=FALSE) %>%
  formatStyle("Avg Risk", background=styleColorBar(c(0,200),"#FF9800"),
              backgroundSize="100% 90%", backgroundRepeat="no-repeat",
              backgroundPosition="center")
```

Row {data-height=620}
-------------------------------------

### Top 5 per Team — Heat Map
```{r fig.height=8, fig.width=11}
top5 <- results %>%
  filter(!is.na(team)) %>%
  group_by(team) %>% slice_max(risk_score, n=5) %>% ungroup()

hm_t <- top5 %>%
  mutate(
    l_backend  = log1p(backend),
    l_frontend = log1p(frontend),
    l_java     = log1p(java_insertions),
    l_tsx      = log1p(tsx_insertions)
  ) %>%
  select(component, team, risk_score,
         `Hist.LPP`=legacy_lpp_avg, `Hist.LPD`=legacy_lpd_avg,
         Backend=l_backend, Frontend=l_frontend,
         Java=l_java, TSX=l_tsx)

cn_t <- names(hm_t)[-(1:3)]
hm_ts <- hm_t
hm_ts[cn_t] <- lapply(hm_t[cn_t], function(x) {
  r <- max(x,na.rm=TRUE)-min(x,na.rm=TRUE)
  if(r==0) rep(0,length(x)) else (x-min(x,na.rm=TRUE))/r
})

hm_ts %>%
  pivot_longer(all_of(cn_t), names_to="ind", values_to="val") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=ind, y=component, fill=val)) +
  geom_tile(color="white", linewidth=0.3) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(colors=c("#f7fbff","#9ecae1","#2171b5","#08306b"),
                       name="Rel. Risk", limits=c(0,1)) +
  facet_wrap(~team, scales="free_y", ncol=3) +
  labs(title=sprintf("%s — Top 5 per Team", params$forecast_label),
       x=NULL, y=NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=9) +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=35,hjust=1),
        panel.grid.major=element_blank(),
        strip.text=element_text(face="bold"))
```

Historical Validation
=====================================

Row {data-height=420}
-------------------------------------

### LPP: Top Components by Historical Risk {data-width=500}
```{r fig.height=5}
# Show top components by historical LPP + churn signal
lpp_hist <- completed %>%
  group_by(component, team) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_lpp    = mean(lpp, na.rm=TRUE),
    avg_churn  = mean(total_churn, na.rm=TRUE),
    n_quarters = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    z_avg_lpp     = (avg_lpp - mean(avg_lpp, na.rm=TRUE)) /
                     max(sd(avg_lpp, na.rm=TRUE), 1e-6),
    z_avg_churn   = (log1p(avg_churn) - mean(log1p(avg_churn), na.rm=TRUE)) /
                     max(sd(log1p(avg_churn), na.rm=TRUE), 1e-6),
    lpp_risk_score = 0.6 * z_avg_lpp + 0.4 * z_avg_churn,
    risk_cat = risk_label(percent_rank(lpp_risk_score)*100)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(lpp_risk_score)) %>%
  head(20) %>%
  mutate(component = fct_reorder(component, lpp_risk_score))

ggplot(lpp_hist, aes(x=component, y=avg_lpp, fill=risk_cat)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values=RISK_COLORS, name="Risk Level") +
  labs(title="LPP Historical Risk — Top 20 Components",
       subtitle="Average customer bugs per quarter across all mature releases",
       x=NULL, y="Avg LPP per Quarter") +
  theme_minimal(base_size=11) +
  theme(legend.position="bottom", panel.grid.major.y=element_blank())
```

### LPD: Predicted vs Actual (`r valid_q`) {data-width=500}
```{r fig.height=5}
lpd_vp2 <- (if(best_lpd=="Random Forest") predict(lpd_model,newdata=vd) else
              soft_cap(predict(lpd_model,newdata=vd,type="response"),max_lpd)) * lpd_cal

vd %>% mutate(pred=lpd_vp2, risk=risk_label(percent_rank(pred)*100)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=pred, y=LPD)) +
  geom_point(aes(color=risk), size=2.5, alpha=0.7) +
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept=0, linetype="dashed", color="grey50") +
  geom_text(data=. %>% arrange(desc(LPD)) %>% head(8),
            aes(label=component), hjust=-0.1, size=2.5, check_overlap=TRUE) +
  scale_color_manual(values=RISK_COLORS, name="Risk") +
  labs(title=sprintf("LPD Validation: %s | R²=%.3f | Cal=%.3f", valid_q, lpd_r2, lpd_cal),
       x="Predicted", y="Actual") +
  theme_minimal(base_size=11) + theme(legend.position="bottom")
```

Row {data-height=300}
-------------------------------------

### Historical Bug Counts by Quarter
```{r fig.height=4}
completed %>%
  group_by(quarter, is_lts) %>%
  summarise(LPP=sum(lpp,na.rm=TRUE), LPD=sum(lpd,na.rm=TRUE), .groups="drop") %>%
  pivot_longer(c(LPP,LPD), names_to="type", values_to="count") %>%
  mutate(label=ifelse(is_lts==1, paste0(quarter," ★"), quarter)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=reorder(label,quarter), y=count, fill=type)) +
  geom_col(position="dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c(LPP="#1565C0", LPD="#B71C1C"), name=NULL) +
  labs(title="Historical Bug Counts by Quarter", subtitle="★ = LTS release",
       x=NULL, y="Bug Count") +
  theme_minimal(base_size=11) +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=35,hjust=1), legend.position="top")
```
